actions.name: Restart fade
actions.description: Run the entire fade from the beginning again.

actions.name: Set fade-in time
actions.description: Set the corresponding properties described under Fade properties.

actions.name: Set fade-out time
actions.description: If the Enabled property is disabled, this will begin the fade.

conditions.name: On fade-in finished
conditions.description: Triggered when each stage of the fade finishes.

expressions.name: FadeInTime
expressions.description: Return the corresponding properties described under Fade properties.
